ValidationRule.description: Validation to have details about 'other' current vendor Updated by PwC as part of SC-433 - Consumables and Service Contract record types excluded from the validation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Consumables', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'ServiceContract', AND(( ISPICKVAL(LSS_Bid_Current_Vendor__c , "other") ), LSS_Current_Vendor_Other__c ="" ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_014: If "Other" Current vendor is selected, provide details
